mapper.insert: INSERT INTO charge_lots (wallet_id, amount, remaining_amount) VALUES (#{walletId}, #{amount}, #{remainingAmount})
mapper.select: SELECT id, wallet_id, amount, remaining_amount, charged_at, withdrawable_at FROM charge_lots WHERE wallet_id = #{walletId} AND remaining_amount > 0 ORDER BY charged_at ASC
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(remaining_amount), 0) FROM charge_lots WHERE wallet_id = #{walletId} AND withdrawable_at <= now()
